rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE SUSAN LEE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petitioner Peter K. Lees Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Further Responses To Request For Production, Set No. One And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Peter K. Lee's Motion to Compel Further Responses to Request for Production, Set No. One is granted. Trustee Shacuan Sharon Seto must provide further responses within 15 days of the order. The request for sanctions is denied without prejudice. Should responses not be provided within 15 days of the order, Peter Lee reserves the right to submit an amended order for full sanctions or move for additional sanctions, including evidentiary sanctions. The prevailing party shall provide a proposed order. Any party choosing to contest shall notify the court and opposing counsel no later than 3/24/2015, at 4:00 p.m.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE SUSAN LEE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petitioner Peter K. Lees Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set No. One And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: The motion to compel further responses to special interrogatories is granted. The request for sanctions is denied. The prevailing party shall submit a proposed order. Any party choosing to contest must notify the court and opposing counsel no later than 10:00 a.m. on 3/25/2015.

rulings.Case Title: IN RE STEPHEN K. LEE IRREVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petitioner Peter K. Lees Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Further Responses To Request For Production, Set No. One And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Peter K. Lee's Motion to Compel Further Responses to Request for Production, Set No. One is granted. Shacuan Sharon Lee Seto must provide further responses no later than 15 days from this order. The request for sanctions is denied without prejudice. If Shacuan Seto fails to provide further responses within 15 days of the order, Peter Lee reserves the right to submit an amended order for full sanctions, or alternatively, move for further sanctions, including evidentiary sanctions. The prevailing party shall submit a proposed order. Any party choosing to contest the court's tentative ruling shall notify opposing counsel and the court no later than 3/24/15, at 4:00 p.m.
